name: Patient 6
history: 28-year-old student recently returned from Egypt. First time managing bills, finances, and health insurance independently. Brother remains dependent.
intermediate_belief: Adult responsibilities are overwhelming and I can't handle them.
intermediate_belief_depression: I'm failing at being an independent adult while others succeed.
coping_strategies: Avoiding financial tasks, comparing self to brother, seeking parental rescue.
situation: Received an insurance claim with an unexpected balance.
auto_thought: "I can't understand this. They're trying to trick me. I'm in over my head."
behavior: Ignores the bill, calls parents for help, considers dropping insurance.
